name: Ryan Park
abilities: ★ Commissioner of the Open — books every course and tee time, pilots the shuttle fleet, chases down the dues, and orders the pizza (pepperoni, pineapple, hot peppers). Nothing at the Open moves until Ryan says go.
Ship's Log. Pairs Champion in 2023 with Mike Praught (286), and a fixture near the top — net finishes '22 · 10th   '23 · 7th   '24 · 16th   '25 · 11th.
flavor: “Your own wedding or your own funeral are acceptable excuses to miss the Open. Everything else should've been planned better.”
caption: Ryan Park · The Mycelium Syndicate 🍄
